message:
test: wave 81 — 9 pure data-type tests for codec, http, messaging modules

Coverage: LengthDelimitedCodec, LengthDelimitedCodecBuilder (Debug, Clone),
PoolKey (Debug, Clone, Eq, Ord, Hash), PooledConnectionState (Debug, Clone, Copy, Eq),
AutoOffsetReset (Debug, Clone, Copy, Eq, Default), IsolationLevel (Debug, Clone, Copy, Eq, Default),
ConsumerConfig (Debug, Clone), NatsConfig (Debug, Clone, Default),
ServerInfo (Debug, Clone, Default).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
